title: KINGLAKE Christmas Tree Ribbon Silver Wired Ribbon Organza, 10 Yards 2.5Inch Glitter Snowflake Sheer Ribbons for Wreaths Gift Wrapping Xmas Tree Garland Decorations Making Bows
features: [Wired Ribbon] - Silver Christmas ribbon with fine metal wire edge, flexible and easy to shape and fix, very suitable for making beautiful bows, making it more three-dimensional, excellent decorative ribbon for gift wrapping.

[Glitter Christmas Snowflake Ribbon] - Sheer ribbon decorated with silver trim and printed with classic silver snowflake pattern, very suitable for Christmas theme, more festive charm under the reflection of light, perfect Christmas tree ribbon, adds a special touch to Christmas wreaths and Christmas gift wrapping, fashionable and classic design makes your decorations more impressive.

[High-quality Organza Ribbon] - Xmas tree ribbon is made of high-quality transparent organza, delicate and flexible texture, light and breathable, looks exquisite and elegant, has good seams, not easy to break loose, and can be used for a long time.

[Multiple Uses] - Metallic shiny ribbon can be used to make bows on Christmas trees, garland, door wreaths and gift boxes, also ideal for making DIY crafts, scrapbooking, sewing, bouquet packaging, making cards, decorating party gifts, Christmas cakes, wrapping around chairs/bottles/Christmas candles/gift baskets, etc., suitable for Christmas, weddings, Valentine's Day, parties, anniversaries, etc.

[Easy to Use] - The package comes with a roll of 6.3cm/2.5inch silver snowflake wired Christmas ribbon, 10 yards/9.14m in length, enough length for wrapping around the Christmas tree and meet your diverse DIY and decoration needs. Rolled on a reel for easy storage and use, not easily wrinkled.
